description: A casting director needs to review thousands of actor submissions for a new role and narrow them down to a shortlist.

nodes.task_description: Filter all submissions based on the role's requirements (e.g., age range, gender, specific skills).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent filters over 5,000 submissions down to 200 that meet the basic criteria.

nodes.task_description: Review the headshots and resumes of the filtered candidates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews the materials for the 200 candidates.

nodes.task_description: Create a shortlist of the top 20 candidates and schedule them for an audition.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a shortlist and sends out audition invitations.
